title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0080 17 Clarendon Road, Bristol, BS6 7EX
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Vishal Shaunak  Site address:  17 Clarendon Road, Bristol, BS6 7EX  Description of proposed development:  Erection of single storey rear extension at lower ground level and conversion of property from a 13-bedroom House in Multiple Occupation (HMO) to a 3-bedroom HMO at lower ground level; a 2-bedroom flat at ground floor and a 7-bedroom HMO at first and second floor.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 24 February 2025   Date by when representations must be made 22 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 9 May 2025   Decision date 19 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 136 KB, 8 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 22 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0080 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form  (PDF, 2.09 MB, 14 pages)  010 rev a  (PDF, 438 KB, 1 page)  17 002  (PDF, 170 KB, 1 page)  17 100  (PDF, 148 KB, 1 page)  250204 PR002593 PS FINAL  (PDF, 596 KB, 17 pages)  BNG exemption form  (PDF, 1.01 MB, 4 pages)  C 001  (PDF, 140 KB, 1 page)  cil questions  (PDF, 800 KB, 6 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 529 KB, 8 pages)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   Questionnaire_17_Clarendon_Road  (PDF, 133 KB, 5 pages)  Bristol_City_Council_-_CIL_Liable  (PDF, 59.8 KB, 2 pages)  2023-24_CIL_Report  (PDF, 705 KB, 20 pages)  2023-24_Infrastructure_List  (PDF, 270 KB, 3 pages)...
